title: FanNudge
description: Personalized crowd control nudge message tailored to a specific fan's language and accessibility needs.

fan_id.description: Unique identifier of the target fan.

mobility_needs.description: True if the fan requires accessible (step-free) routing.

message_text.description: Personalized GenAI-generated message text prompting the fan to route elsewhere.

suggested_route.description: Recommended route code or gate to use instead of the congested zone.

transit_tip.description: Optional short transportation or sustainability tip (≤ ~20 words). For 'normal' status this is a light eco/transit nudge (e.g. recommending public transit). For 'watch'/'critical' status this is a practical congestion-avoidance transit suggestion framed as being faster for the fan. Written in the same language as message_text. May be absent if the LLM omits it.

generated_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the nudge was generated.
